name: mw-customer-clarity-free
description: Metamorphosis Worldwide, Customer Clarity AI System (Free edition). Pulls your Fathom or Microsoft 365 call transcripts (or accepts pasted Teams/Zoom/Otter transcripts) and builds one customer avatar in your customers' own words. The free lead magnet; the full multi-avatar system, founder voice, content, and CRM logging are the paid edition.
